name: Linear_Slope_CCI_Regime_Position
description: A structural 30-minute position intraday strategy designed to ride sustained macro momentum expansions on the VN30F1M contract. It tracks underlying market velocity using a long-period Linear Regression Slope to filter out short-term lagging distortions. Directional trends are verified when a medium-period Commodity Channel Index (CCI) breaches its tactical boundaries. To guard against getting chopped up in narrow sideways markets and completely avoid division traps on flat or zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion condition where the short standard deviation breaks past an ATR threshold baseline. Out-of-loop vectorized exits use an adaptive midpoint anchor combined with an ATR offset.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midpoint_Exit - 0.25 * ATR) or (Slope < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Midpoint_Exit + 0.25 * ATR) or (Slope > 0.0).
